feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to Enable Document Type/Numbering configuration in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
We are unable to configure/create new document types in SAP S/4HANA Cloud? 
How is numbering configured within Sales Documents?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: I want to run a job in ADT for a Custom Object created in S/4HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

I want to run a job in ADT for a Custom Object created in S/4HANA Public cloud.

I have created a custom business object in S/4HANA Public Cloud and generated Odata.
I am trying to check the steps to create a Job in ADT (Eclipse) and execute the custom business object with the help of the following SAP HELP.

https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/application-jobs?locale=en-US
I was able to create the Job Catalog and Job Template. However, I do not know how to code the interface IF_APJ_RT_RUN to call Odata and execute the custom business object.

I also refer to this blog, but after creating Service Consumption, when I create a new Class and code it, I get the error “Implementation missing for method” and cannot proceed.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/how-to-call-a-remote-odata-service-from-the-trial-version-of-sap-cloud/ba-p/13411535

If anyone knows of a solution or coding, I would appreciate it.

entry.title: 物料主数据中的销售文本如何批量维护？
entry.content: 物料主数据中由于物料描述限制长度为40，我们需要在销售文本中维护完整的物料描述信息，但是没有找到批量维护的字段，请问这个字段能否批量维护？谢谢！

entry.title: Please suggest us how to upload supplier invoices with reference to purchase order.
entry.content:
Please suggest us how to upload supplier invoices with reference to purchase order.

Which will popularly called as "MIRO" Transaction.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Group Reporting Public Cloud Edition Consolidation Monitor - Old Version
entry.content:
Hello Group Reporting Experts, 

Is there any planned released when the Consolidation Monitor - Old Version will be deprecated in the Public Cloud Edition?

Thanks.

entry.title: Calculate Exchange Rates for Cash Journals - Hungary
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In Ungarn there are special requirements regarding exchange rates in connection with cash journals. For this purpose, SAP provides us with the Calculate Exchange Rates for Cash Journals - Hungary app in the public cloud.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/e3843957b79a4b828c4187f3c45df09a/198c33c75ced470a8e80a307a3fe0fff.html?locale=en-US&profile=20324635&source=productlink-webassistant

It seems that this app only takes petty cash into account. We have received a request that this special type of exchange rate calculation is also relevant for bank accounts.

Is there an option to include the bank accounts in this app as well?

Many thanks

Sebastian

entry.title: Report on AP Invoice Approval workflow
entry.content:
Hi, 

We need a report of AP Invoice approval matrix (App: Manage Workflows for Supplier Invoices) but can't seem to extract this data from SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud system. We are not looking for a report of approvers of each Invoice but rather the approval matrix itself. There are no apps or released CDS views to extract this data from. Could you please advise if this is possible?

Kind Regards,

Praneetha

entry.title: Intelligent Scenario Management model training failed
entry.content:
Dear expert, 

I'm facing authorization error for training existing intelligent scenario SUPLRDELIVPREDICT. I'm having SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR role but still not authorized to train the model. 

Training failed : SUPLRDELIVPREDICT - model Suplr_Delvry_PredYou don't have any authorization to Create Model Version for Intelligent Scenario SUPLRDELIVPREDICT.

I tried to trace the missing auth but i dont see failed object in Authorization tracing. 

Any idea what role is missing to train model in Intelligent Scenario?

@PritiDhingra 

Regards,

Ben

entry.title: What is the reason to provide profit center for bank accounts and while doing payment entry?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

What is the reason to provide a profit center for bank accounts, and while doing payment entry?, Even though those are balance sheet accou

entry.title: How to Mass Maintain WBS Element for Multiple PO Items with Account Assignment Category Q
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently working with Purchase Orders in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, and I've run into an efficiency issue when dealing with multiple PO items that use Account Assignment Category Q (Proj. make-to-order
).

As expected, when selecting category Q, the system requires the WBS Element field to be filled at the item level. This works fine functionally, but it becomes very time-consuming when I have to input the same WBS Element for a large number of line items.

What I've tried so far:

  • ✅ Manually entering the WBS element per item (works, but inefficient)

  • ✅ Creating one item with the correct WBS Element and then copying the entire item. This helps retain the WBS field, but still requires me to manually update material number, quantity, and price for each copied line — which is still quite tedious.
  • ❌ Couldn't find an APP or options that seem to support mass-edit or table input mode for WBS elements

Is there any efficient way to mass update or copy the WBS Element across multiple PO items when using account assignment category Q in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Any advice, workaround, or configuration tips would be highly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: How to process IDOC (DELFOR/DELJIT/DESADV)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We require an integration for IDOC processing( Inbound & Outbound ) with one of our customer. We investigated a lot but didn't found any way to process IDOC in public cloud.

Inbound:
1. DELFOR 
2. DELJIT 

Outbound:
1. DESADV

Can you please guide us what are the services required to subscribed & how to achieve the same, we are already have CPI subscription.

Thank You


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: What to investigate before deleting users
entry.content:
I have a large number of Communication users which I want to delete from the system.  The users does not have any roles or profiles assigned.

Are there anything I need to investigate before I delete the users?

Thanks

Dorthe

entry.title: How to maintain copy control from preliminary billing document to billing document
entry.content: I have condition types entered manually in sales order creation. After creating a preliminary billing document from sales order, it goes through approval workflow. Once PBD is approved, I have a scheduled job for creation of billing documents from preliminary billing documents. Upon checking of billing document, the conditions I have maintained in sales order are removed. Is there a way to maintain copy control or pricing type for billing document creation from preliminary billing documents?

entry.title: RA keys
entry.content:
Dear Experts 

Does anyone know how to get the details of the RA Keys provided in SA S4 HANA Public cloud ?

i can't find any configuration for it and the provided RA Keys Description is Vague 

Also i can't find where do we configure the RA Versions 

Regards

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and Central Finance
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am looking for possibilities in the integration of S/4HANA Public Cloud and Central Finance. According to the newest SAP Help updates 2502 I can replicate :

  • Replication and initial load of FI/CO documents

  • Replication and initial load of CO documents

  • Replication and initial load of cost objects

  • Comparison reports

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6b39bd1d0e5e4099a5b65d835c29c696/adb033afc0464aafbdaf3060e08a4d7c.html

This blog also points to the scope item 1W4. When checking out the scope item this doesn't reflect the whole replication but only supplier invoices and clearing processes - looking like intercompany clearing processes. 

https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2502/SolP/1W4?region=DE

Also I found all the restrictions applying to the connection: 

https://me.sap.com/notes/3398470

But this is neither stating what is actually possible. 

Does someone has any experience whether we can integrate the Public Cloud System with CFIN for Data Replication looking at FI/CO Documents to use CFIN as "System-of-Record"?

Thanks a lot 

Lena

entry.title: How to consume RAP BO Events of the Document Info Record (DIR) locally in SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

actually i am trying to consume a event (locally) of the document info record (DIR) in SAP Public Cloud embedded steampunk. In the Accelerator Hub there are some listed events for the DIR. However i cannot find the Business Object Interface for the DIR with the corresponding events. 

 

Does that mean that the events cannot be consumed at all altough they are listed and released?

 

 

Is there any way to consume this events locally in SAP Public Cloud?

entry.title: BOM更改凭证无法显示
entry.content: BOM存在更改,但是显示BOM并且在BOM的“菜单”-“环境”-“更改凭证”，路径中，更改凭证为灰色，即无法查询BOM的更改凭证，其中BOM抬头产品为“17”，BOM用途为“1”

entry.title: Can you tell me the view where I can check the BP Master Industry and Risk Class?
entry.content:
We are creating a custom CDS for BP master at the request of a customer.
Could you please tell me the view that can obtain the industry information and risk class information registered in the BP master in the image below?

entry.title: Can't select 'Standard Hierarchy Node' in the App Manage Profit Centers
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

i can't select a Standard Hierarchy Node in the App Manage Profit Centers.

But in CBC in "Define Profit Center Standard Hierarchy" there is a Hierarchy YBPH. 

Can someone help me with this? 

Kind Regards

Katharina

entry.title: Is there any equivalent app to J3RKKRD / J3RKKRS on SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m currently working on an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system and looking for equivalent applications to the following on-premise programs:

J3RKKRD – Russia: G/L Account Balance

J3RKKRS – Russia: G/L Account Line Items

I’ve already searched in the Fiori App Library and found some apps that seem to have similar functionality. However, when I checked the Business Catalog listed in the library, I couldn’t find any matching catalogs available in our public cloud system for role assignment.

I would like to ask:

Are there standard apps in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud that are functionally equivalent to J3RKKRD and J3RKKRS?

If yes, what is the Business Catalog associated with them?

If the apps are available in the library but not in our system, is there any way to activate or request them? 

Thanks in advance for your support!
